# repo-hygiene

Read the repo state, inspect active worktrees, then route git branch and worktree cleanup through the shared dotfiles repo-hygiene workflow.

## Steps

1. Start from the repo-native references before using mutating tools.
2. Read the relevant resources first: ralph:///{repo}/triage, ralph:///catalog/workflows, ralph:///catalog/skills, ralph:///runtime/health.
3. Route the task through the matching skills: ralphglasses-repo-admin (.agents/skills/ralphglasses-repo-admin/SKILL.md), ralphglasses-discovery (.agents/skills/ralphglasses-discovery/SKILL.md).
4. Load only the required tool groups: core, repo, observability.
5. Use the key tools as the primary execution path: ralphglasses_status, ralphglasses_repo_health, ralphglasses_worktree_list, ralphglasses_worktree_cleanup.
6. When structured prompting helps, use the matching prompts: repo-triage-brief.
